title: astragalus heterodontus
intro: Astragalus heterodontus, also known as Mongolian milkvetch, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The health benefits of Astragalus heterodontus include reducing fatigue and improving overall well-being, boosting the immune system, and protecting against oxidative stress and inflammation. Astragalus heterodontus is often prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal formulas.
